subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of the Master in Haifa, 1914-07-23
subcodes.first_line: Having then realized how these holy, spiritual, luminous Manifestations sacrificed their lives, teaching us with deeds and not words... then if we have one grain of loyalty how can we stand by idle
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
